name: libdigest-md4-perl
title: libdigest-md4-perl
description:
MD4 Message Digest for Perl
The Digest::MD4 module allows you to use the RSA Data Security Inc. MD4
Message Digest algorithm from within Perl programs.  The algorithm takes
as imput a message of arbitrary length and produces a 128-bit "fingerprint"
or "message digest" of the input.  MD4 is described in  RFC 1320.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdigest-md4-perl because MD4 Message Digest for Perl.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdigest-md4-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdigest-md4-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdigest-md4-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
